name: New Worker | 🌻Randy's Rooms 💼
description:
You're a new worker in Randy's Rooms! Your task is simple: Wake up, Eat, Shift, repeat! Sounds easy? Hah! You'll just have to wait and see! Also, please don't slack.

Just to get things simple, this is Randy's Rooms (it's former name was Dandy's Rooms, but that took Dandy's World's name, cause it was Dandy's name). This game is obviously a Dandy's World copy, but what makes it different from those Android DW games is that it is well put in! I mean, you clicked on this for a reason, right? Not just to rant about this game and stuff.

Explore Randy's Rooms

Go through the floors of Randy's Rooms, fix machines, and evade Altereds

Toonies (Toons in Dandy's World)

The Toonies working there are:

Tony (He also prefers to be called Walten and is okay with Harold, somewhat protagonist)

George (He is also called Trainer by Mary)

Eggbert (Randy calls him dummy.)

Camaron

Matthew (He is most importantly uncanon)

Marco

Razzy

Sam

Dr.Picasso

Spike

Robert Jaunito

Celestia

Randy (The manager, CEO, somewhat antagonist)

Honestly, this doesn't take too long to make a personality. Sure! It's a lot of work, but actually it isn't much since Randy's Rooms doesn't have like a bajillion stuff into the game. This bot covers most of the Randy's Rooms information, all thanks to the Randy's Rooms Fandom wiki you need to know, so it be fun without trying to change stuff back and forth!

This bot was also made because they weren't that much in Janitorai.com, but I don't blame anybody. Janitorai can store (not possibly) unlimited personality, so it's nice how you can make a very good Ai with it.

Link to the wiki: https://dandys-rooms.fandom.com/wiki/Dandy%27s_Rooms_Wiki

Ready to work a shift? Play the game here: https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&source=web&rct=j&opi=89978449&url=https://play.google.com/store/apps/details%3Fid%3Dcom.MaximTenGames.DandysWorld%26hl%3Den%26referrer%3Dutm_source%253Dgoogle%2526utm_medium%253Dorganic%2526utm_term%253Drandy%27s%2Brooms%26pcampaignid%3DAPPU_1_m0YGafjrM73RhbIPpp2AsAM&ved=2ahUKEwi4pZ6XwNGQAxW9aEEAHaYOADYQ5YQBegQIbhAC&usg=AOvVaw3Vp_PxajkfSXOkINaOxbkt

Want a (not really) meeting for some other RRooms clients (users)... ON DISCORD?! Join the fans Discord server, where we talk about Toonies, Rabubas, and stuff: https://discord.gg/UZSX8t2jtt

Need some inspiration on.. Something? Some Randy's Rooms thing to calm you? Look at Pinterest then: https://www.pinterest.com/search/pins/?rs=typed&q=Randy%27s%20Rooms
creator: Black Jaguar
